exclude.G204: All subprocess launches use argv form (exec.Command/CommandContext with separate arguments, never 'sh -c'). User-controlled build inputs (package atom, USE flags, versions, env keys/values) are validated against strict allowlists in internal/builder/validate.go before reaching any command, and container execution passes emerge as argv with env via 'docker exec -e', so no value is shell-interpreted.
exclude.G304: File paths passed to os.Open/os.ReadFile come from operator configuration (config files, GNUPGHOME, PKGDIR, terraform workspace) or from server-generated bundle paths, not from unauthenticated request bodies. Individual call sites carry inline #nosec G304 justifications.
